description: CompositionCobalt blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking, remove promptly5..Line dry inside-out in shade6. Warm iron only7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFittingComfortSpecially designed for beach vacationers, this blue t-shirt from the Mr. Busy collection of mr. men brings out the true spirit of serious fun. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry. Pair it with jeans or chinos and comfortable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the international collection at myntra to complete your fashion statement.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
